component.name: BíbliaRoot
component.summary: Offline Bible reading and study for Linux
Leitura e estudo bíblico offline para Linux

description.p: BíbliaRoot is a desktop application for offline Bible reading and study with multiple translations, text search, favorites, notes, study notebooks, and reading plans.
It also includes translation comparison, imported cross references, daily devotional content, notifications, and a translatable interface.

ul.li: Offline reading with multiple SQLite Bible translations
Quick search and advanced study search
Verse notes, tags, and study notebooks
Light and dark themes with multilingual UI

screenshot.caption: Main reading view with navigation, quick search, and highlighted verses
Text search with results grouped by reference
Study workspace with notes, notebooks, and reading plans

description.p: First functional release with offline reading, study tools, daily notifications, multilingual support, and Flatpak packaging.
